title: Velvet Camellia
description: A floral and velvety French dish featuring a comforting sauce that is kosher-friendly and perfect for a light dinner.
instructions: Heat a saucepan over medium heat. Add butter, minced garlic, and peeled ginger. Cook until fragrant and the butter is melted.
Stir in heavy cream and chicken bouillon cubes. Bring to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes until thickened slightly.
Gently place boneless chicken breasts into the saucepan. Cover with a lid and reduce heat to low. Simmer for about 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through (internal temperature reaches 165°F).
Just before serving, stir in white wine vinegar. Remove from heat.
Garnish each plate with rose petals as desired.
